description: Mexican criminal organization dedicated to drug trafficking and other illegal activities, designated as a foreign terrorist organization by the U.S. State Department. Founded in the 1980s as a vigilante group, it later allied with the Gulf Cartel. In 2011, it split into La Familia Michoacana and Los Caballeros Templarios. Currently active in several Mexican states.

country_links.evidence_quote: Fueron arrestadas 303 personas en Estados Unidos, como parte de la Operación Coronado... Durante el operativo fueron incautados unos 500 kilos de marihuana, 350 kilos de metanfetaminas, 62 kilos de cocaína, US$3.4 millones, 144 armas y 109 automóviles.
country_links.context: The organization had 303 members arrested in the United States as part of Operation Coronado, and drugs, money, and weapons were seized there.
